message:
Fix build errors and clean up lint issues across redesigned components

Resolve Vercel build failures by fixing useMemo dependency array in page.tsx,
cleaning up unused imports/variables across 15+ components from the redesign,
refactoring TerminalStream to avoid setState-in-effect lint error, and adding
eslint-disable comments for legitimate hydration safety patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
